---
title: "Banned Book Website"
author: "Selena Cai"
date: "2025-11-28"
output: html_document
runtime: shiny
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

```

```{R}
library(shiny)
library(leaflet)
library(dplyr)
library(googlesheets4)
library(htmltools)
library(tibble)
library(rsconnect)

```

```{R}
setwd("C:/Users/selen/OneDrive - University of Cambridge/R_Studio/website")

list.files()

```

```{R}
rsconnect::showLogs("BannedBooksMap")


```


```{R}

library(rsconnect)
rsconnect::setAccountInfo(
  name='crasshacademicfreedoms',
  token='25E4521455F70966DE8BAD8EB9DC4E79',
  secret='ETgLs6ci6ktnDLjnGW5APVn5oqXhdALzVS7xsYT+'
)

rsconnect::deployApp(
  appDir = "C:/Users/selen/OneDrive - University of Cambridge/R_Studio/website",
  appName = "BannedBooksMap",
  forceUpdate = TRUE,
    launch.browser = FALSE,
  lint = FALSE
)

```

```
